rulings.Case Title: GREGORY GARVER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YEE LUNG HONG VS. ISAAC HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion; And Motion For Entry Of Default And Judgment For Eviction (Unlawful Detainer) And Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; And Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF YEE HONG's MOTION For Entry Of Default And Judgment For Eviction (Unlawful Detainer) GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for entry of default judgment is denied. Plaintiff presents evidence that after entry of default the parties settled the action. Settlement does not provide for entry of default judgment. Motion for entry of judgment for possession based on breach of stipulation is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file the stipulation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AUDREY CHAING VS. EUGENE MOROZOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Amended Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF AUDREY CHAING's Motion For Entry Of Amended Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUIRING PROPERTIES VS. MALACHY O'BRIEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT MALACHY O'BRIEN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUIRING PROPERTIES VS. MALACHY O'BRIEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT MALACHY O'BRIEN's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 812 GUERRERO LLC VS. REBECCA BAUKNIGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT REBECCA BAUKNIGHT's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. Parties to address whether the termination date fell on the last day of the month for the original 120 day notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALMORAL RESIDENCES, LLC VS. RIGOBERTO MORENO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application And Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Order To Quash Exparte Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT RIGOBERTO MORENO's Application And Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Order To Quash Exparte Writ Of Possession DENIED. = (501/REQ)
